summary: Frontend testing for BranchTransferPage.js bug fix (branch isolation logic) and UX redesign (larger filter pills and transfer cards). Both fixes verified working correctly.

all_branches_consolidated_view.description: Admin in 'All Branches' view sees ONLY View button - no Send/Receive/Accept/Dispute/Edit buttons visible
all_branches_consolidated_view.reason: effectiveBranchId is empty in consolidated view, so isSourceBranch=false and isDestBranch=false

specific_branch_view_branch_1_as_source.description: When Branch 1 selected, source-branch buttons show correctly

code_fix_verified.line_1607: Edit button shows only if isSourceBranch (removed isAdmin)
code_fix_verified.line_1625: Terminal button shows only if isDestBranch (removed isAdmin)

ux_redesign_filter_pills.styling: px-4 py-2.5 rounded-full with colored dots
ux_redesign_filter_pills.attention_styling_note: 'Needs Review' has orange border when count > 0, 'Disputes' has orange border when count > 0

verified_features: Branch isolation: Admin in consolidated 'All Branches' view sees only View button - no branch-specific actions
Branch isolation: When admin selects specific branch, they see actions relevant to that branch's role only
Branch isolation: Source branch sees Send/Edit/Print/Cancel for drafts, Accept/Dispute for received_pending
Filter pills enlarged with px-4 py-2.5 padding and visible counts
Filter pills have colored dots indicating status type
Needs Review pill has orange attention styling when count > 0
Transfer cards have large order numbers (text-base font-bold)
Transfer cards have large branch names (text-base font-semibold)
Transfer cards have visible timeline dots (w-3.5 h-3.5)
Transfer cards have action buttons with text labels (View, Send, Edit, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly implemented: Lines 1516-1517 now use effectiveBranchId only (removed isAdmin OR condition)
For admin in consolidated view, effectiveBranchId = '' which makes both isSourceBranch and isDestBranch false
This correctly hides all branch-specific action buttons in consolidated view
UX redesign properly enlarges filter pills (px-4 py-2.5) and transfer card text elements

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All bug fixes and UX changes verified working

context_for_next_testing_agent: BranchTransferPage branch isolation logic tested. Key insight: effectiveBranchId = currentBranch?.id || user?.branch_id. For admin users, branch_id is empty, so in consolidated 'All Branches' view effectiveBranchId=''. This makes isSourceBranch=(o.from_branch_id === '')=false and isDestBranch=(o.to_branch_id === '')=false. The branch selector in sidebar can be used to switch context. Filter pills data-testid format: filter-all, filter-draft, filter-in_transit, filter-pending, filter-disputes. Transfer card data-testid format: transfer-card-{id}.
